name: Smoked Salmon Pasta
method: Cook the pasta in a pot of salted water for 10 minutes. Drain.
Melt butter in a skillet and sauté the onion and garlic for 5 minutes.
Stir the flour into the butter mixture and keep stirring for 2 minutes.
Bring the liquid just below the boiling point.
Stir in the cheese and keep stirring until the mixture is smooth, about 3 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and simmer for 5 minutes.
Transfer the salmon to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes.
Serve the salmon mixture over the penne pasta.
